Meet Thesis Advisor

Hi everyone!

I’m Munus.

Are you my student?

I teach a wide range of classes…

Technology A!
Tech A — tech-a.munusshih.com ↗
Thesis I — thesis-i.munusshih.com ↗
Thesis II — thesis-ii.munusshih.com ↗
Spring semester
vlb.munusshih.com ↗

My work ethos

I love to make my own tools

I believe that making your own open source design tool is the first step to build a resilient practice without Adobe.

p5.zine is a tool for making an interactive and generative zine with p5.js
p5.zine — openprocessing.org ↗
A tool for creating books with code. It can export to PDF with saddle stitch and bleed settings.
p5.book — editor.p5js.org ↗

I was able to produce the 50 Books x 50 Covers Exhibition this semester using my own custom tool. Another alternative is possible.

professional practice

Client Projects


I work with many mission-aligned organizations and independent researchers to build design systems and digital work.

  • AIGA
    Image of the Studio — imageofthestudio.athleticsnyc.io ↗
  • New Museum
    New Museum — newmuseum.org ↗
  • Processing Foundation
    Fellowships 2025 — processingfoundation.org ↗
  • Robert Blackburn Printmaking Workshop
    The Only Thing That Lasts — blackburnoralhistoryproject.org ↗
  • Just Tech Fellow
    Unearthing Air — todd-dev.free99.work ↗
  • Gallery of Contemporary Art
    GOCA — www.goca.gallery ↗
  • New York Review of Books
  • Secret Riso Club
  • Asian Labor Future Institute
  • Black Zine Fair

I also do...

Commissioned Artwork

a time-based store

I run a cooperative

Worker-owned!

with my two best friends!

design co-op

new book!

new exhibition!

However, thesis is not about me...

Thesis is about You!

Here are some things I’m familiar with…

Open Source Software Experimental Publishing Digital Toolmaking Organizing Togetherness World-building Mutual Aid Critical Code Poetic Computation Open Data Decolonizing Technology Design Justice Archival Practice Building Database Speculative Design Generative Design Critical Pedagogy Artificial Intelligence Machine Learning Natural Language Processing Data Visualization

But I’m also interested in learning about your interests, your practice, and your thesis project. I want to support you in making the work that you want to make, not the work that I want you to make.

We will work well if...

We will work well together if…

You're a book lover
Postcapitalist Desire — kyl.neocities.org ↗
You love archive, index and collection
guansi — www.munusshih.com ↗
You investigate systems and power
Design Justice — critical-potluck.fun ↗
You love preso and crits
crits — preso.JPG ↗
You are experimental
Me with Student Books — books.jpg ↗

No pressure!

It’s just another project!

Email me at munus.shih@pratt.edu

Or find me in the hallways of Pratt!
